gold.title: Coach Scheduling Card
gold.reason: Full booking/appointment UX — animated day-strip, time slots, availability states, and Framer Motion transitions. Drop-in ready for any service-booking landing page.

gold.title: Glass Calendar
gold.reason: Glassmorphism aesthetic with motion animations, event management (add/edit), settings panel, and a visually striking frosted-glass surface. Stands out immediately on premium landing pages.

gold.title: Fullscreen Calendar
gold.reason: Spacious, Google Calendar-inspired full-page layout with event slots, search, and a + add button. Conveys product maturity and makes a strong impression in SaaS hero sections.

gold.title: Origami Fold Out Calendar
gold.reason: Accordion-driven fold-out interaction is visually distinctive and memorable — a great hook for any scheduling or availability feature on a marketing page.

gold.title: Heatmap Calendar
gold.reason: GitHub-contribution-style heatmap with popover event details. Visually arresting data-storytelling pattern — ideal for SaaS dashboards, habit trackers, or analytics landing pages.

gold.title: Git Hub Calendar
gold.reason: Polished GitHub-style contribution heatmap with a custom color scale and date-range spanning. Distinctive visual identity that impresses immediately on portfolio or analytics pages.

gold.title: Event Constellation Calendar
gold.reason: Creative constellation/star-pattern metaphor for event plotting — genuinely unique visual concept that would make a landing page memorable.

gold.title: Particle Flow Calendar
gold.reason: Animated particle-flow visual language for events makes this a showpiece component — eye-catching for creative SaaS or productivity tool landing pages.

gold.title: Calender
gold.reason: CVA-powered variant system with Framer Motion animations and a year/month Select switcher — polished and flexible, noticeably above a bare shadcn wrapper.

gold.title: Three Dwall Calendar
gold.reason: 3D wall / depth perspective on calendar cells combined with HoverCard previews creates a visually premium spatial experience unique among these components.

gold.title: Event Calendar
gold.reason: Full event CRUD with Framer Motion animations, Dialog-based creation form, and color-coded events on a monthly grid — a complete, polished calendar widget.

gold.title: Calendar
gold.reason: Custom-built (no react-day-picker dependency) with AnimatePresence month transitions, today highlighting, and a clean type-safe data model — visually refined and self-contained.

gold.title: Monthly Heatmap Calendar
gold.reason: Month-scoped heat intensity grid with popover event detail — a focused, visually distinctive analytics widget ideal for habit-tracking or usage dashboards.

gold.title: Task Orbit Calendar
gold.reason: Orbital/radial metaphor for task distribution around calendar days is a creative differentiator that would make a productivity SaaS landing page stand out.

gold.title: Stacked Bar Calendar
gold.reason: Combines calendar navigation with stacked bar visualisations per day — a unique data-rich pattern ideal for project management or analytics product pages.

gold.title: Priority Pyramid Calendar
gold.reason: Pyramid/tiered priority metaphor layered onto a calendar is visually novel and communicates sophistication for task-management SaaS landing pages.

gold.title: Pill Calendar
gold.reason: Pill-shaped date cells built on react-aria-components with RangeCalendar support — clean, accessible, and visually distinctive alternative to rectangular day cells.

gold.title: Side Panel Multi Calendar
gold.reason: Split-panel layout combining calendar navigation with a scrollable event list — a polished booking-style UI pattern ready for appointment or tour-booking pages.

gold.title: Inbox Calendar
gold.reason: Calendar + scrollable inbox/event list with Badges and Separators creates a two-pane productivity UI that conveys product depth on a SaaS landing page.

gold.title: Event Path Calendar
gold.reason: Path/timeline metaphor connecting events across calendar days is a genuinely novel visual approach for event-planning or project-management product pages.

gold.title: Scheduler
gold.reason: Full scheduler with time-slot selection, date picking, Label-annotated fields, and Card layout — a complete booking widget with clear visual hierarchy.

gold.title: Calendar Scheduler
gold.reason: Calendar + time-slot card with CardFooter confirm action and cn-controlled slot states — a polished end-to-end appointment booking widget.

gold.title: Event Calendar
gold.reason: Full-featured event calendar with add/delete via Trash2, uuid-keyed events, and Card wrapper — clean, functional, and visually complete for landing pages.

silver.title: Day Picker
silver.reason: Animated frequency-selector (Daily/Weekly/Monthly) with spring transitions and day-of-week toggles — creative interaction but narrowly utility-focused rather than a full calendar.

silver.title: Calendar Lume
silver.reason: Adds animated year/month scroll-area navigation on top of the base Calendar — a meaningful visual upgrade over shadcn default with Framer Motion transitions.

silver.title: Calendar Planner
silver.reason: Year-range-aware month grid planner with info annotations per month — useful planning widget with clear visual structure, though lower visual drama.

silver.title: Calendar Twin
silver.reason: Dual side-by-side month view with shared navigation — practical range-selection pattern that reads as premium compared to a single-month default.

silver.title: Calendar With Presets
silver.reason: DayPicker with preset quick-select buttons — adds real user value for booking pages though the base styling remains close to shadcn default.

silver.title: Chrono Select
silver.reason: Popover-triggered calendar with a clean CalendarIcon trigger button — well-structured date picker pattern, functional and tidy.

silver.title: Date Time Input
silver.reason: Calendar + time input in a popover with format() display — combines date and time selection cleanly, useful for appointment forms.

silver.title: Date Time Picker
silver.reason: Date + Clock icon time picker in a popover — clean, standard date-time combination with good icon usage and clear formatting.

silver.title: Dropdown Multi Calendar
silver.reason: Multi-date selection with Badge display and Card layout — adds meaningful visual feedback for multi-booking scenarios.

silver.title: Dropdown Range Date Picker
silver.reason: Month/year Select dropdowns combined with range calendar in a popover — adds navigation affordances that improve on a plain DayPicker.

silver.title: Multi Month Calendar
silver.reason: Multi-month DayPicker with year/month Select dropdowns for quick navigation — a solid range-picker upgrade for booking flows.

silver.title: Multi Select Calendar Card
silver.reason: Multi-date selection displayed as Badges in a Card with footer confirmation — clean multi-booking widget pattern.

silver.title: Universal Date Picker
silver.reason: Preset date ranges (last 7/30/90 days, etc.) plus custom calendar with a CalendarIcon trigger — a production-grade analytics date picker.

silver.title: Mini Calendar
silver.reason: Weekly strip view with date-fns navigation and highlighted selected day — compact, clean widget ideal for scheduling sidebars.

silver.title: Calendar [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible react-aria-components implementation with proper ARIA semantics — good quality, accessible, though visually standard.

silver.title: Date Picker [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Full react-aria DatePicker + DateRangePicker with Dialog/Popover — well-structured accessible implementation.

silver.title: Date Range Picker [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible range picker built on react-aria-components — solid and correct, visually clean but not distinctive.

silver.title: Range Calendar [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible range calendar with react-aria — good quality accessible component, standard styling.

silver.title: Calendar [React-Area]
silver.reason: React-aria Calendar with clean cn-based styling — above a bare shadcn wrap but not visually distinctive.

silver.title: Calendar [React Day Picker]
silver.reason: Well-structured DayPicker with buttonVariants — clean, polished, slightly above shadcn default.

silver.title: Date Field [React Area]
silver.reason: Segment-based date/time field via react-aria with TimeField support — functional and clean, good for form contexts.

silver.title: Calendar
silver.reason: DayPicker with ChevronsUpDown navigation and custom cell sizing — a clean, thoughtful style upgrade over base shadcn.

silver.title: Calendar
silver.reason: Custom-built calendar with comprehensive date-fns usage covering intervals, weeks, and multi-view support — thorough implementation.

silver.title: Date Picker
silver.reason: Ark-UI DatePicker with Portal and clear/prev/next controls — clean and functional, adds value over a plain input.

silver.title: Calendar 1
silver.reason: Ark-UI DatePicker rendered inline with timezone support — functional accessible implementation, clean styling.

silver.title: Flexi Filter Table
silver.reason: Table with integrated calendar-based date filtering and checkboxes — a useful data-management pattern though it's a table, not a calendar per se.

silver.title: Calendar
silver.reason: Feature-grid calendar with Popover/Command-based feature selector and event grouping by day — functional product calendar widget.

silver.title: Calendar With Booked Days
silver.reason: Extends shadcn calendar with booked-day highlighting — directly useful for booking pages, modest but purposeful upgrade.

silver.title: Calendar With Event Slots
silver.reason: Event slot indicators on calendar days — a practical booking/scheduling enhancement.

silver.title: Calendar With Time Presets
silver.reason: Quick-select time presets alongside a calendar — useful composite for appointment booking pages.

silver.title: Calendar With Time Picker Inline
silver.reason: Inline time picker integrated below the calendar — clean date+time selection pattern for booking forms.

silver.title: Dual Calendar
silver.reason: Side-by-side two-month calendar wrapper with forwardRef — practical range selection aid.

bronze.title: Calendar 1
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn Calendar import with defaultMonth prop and a small caption label. No visual upgrade.

bronze.title: Calendar 1
bronze.reason: Subframe internal component using proprietary SubframeCore — not portable or reusable outside Subframe ecosystem.

bronze.title: Economic Calendar
bronze.reason: Financial/trading event list widget — overly domain-specific (country codes, economic indicators) for general website redesign use.
